custom_filename.mechanism: not observed — amp requires SKILL.md as the fixed canonical filename

disable_model_invocation.mechanism: not documented — no mechanism to prevent the model from auto-invoking a skill; the model always selects based on name and description match

project_scope.mechanism: skill directory placed under .agents/skills/<name>/ or .claude/skills/<name>/ within the project root

shared_scope.mechanism: not documented — only project-scope (.agents/skills/) and user-wide (~/.config/agents/skills/) are described; no enterprise or shared scope exists

user_invocable.mechanism: not documented — no mechanism to hide skills from user-facing menus is described; skills are managed via 'amp skill' CLI and command palette, not a slash-command invocation menu

providerExtensions.name: MCP server bundling
providerExtensions.summary: Bundle an MCP server with the skill via mcp.json (local command or remote URL); tools stay hidden until skill loads.

providerExtensions.name: Executable tool bundling via toolbox/
providerExtensions.summary: Auto-register executables placed in skill's toolbox/ subdirectory as tools (stdin/stdout JSON contract).

providerExtensions.name: Bundled passive resources
providerExtensions.summary: Include arbitrary files (scripts, templates, configs) alongside SKILL.md; agent reads them by relative path.

providerExtensions.name: CLI and command palette skill management
providerExtensions.summary: Manage skills via 'amp skill' CLI or command palette (add/list/remove); supports GitHub shorthand paths.

providerExtensions.name: Automatic model-driven invocation
providerExtensions.summary: Model auto-selects skill by matching user request against frontmatter name/description; SKILL.md body loads on demand.
